details:
The security team is marking the Composer module for Drupal project unsupported. There is a known security issue with the project that has not been fixed by the maintainer. If you would like to maintain this project, please read: [https://www.drupal.org/node/251466#s-becoming-owner-maintainer-or-co-mai...](https://www.drupal.org/node/251466#s-becoming-owner-maintainer-or-co-maintainer-of-a-project-that-is-unsupported-for-security-reasons)

*Note: this is about a project for the Drupal system that makes use of composer. It is not a vulnerability in the composer software itself.*
